description_long: This is a vintage biplane with a light gray fuselage and two stacked wings, each adorned with black Iron Cross insignia, reminiscent of early 20th-century German military aircraft. The wings are supported by a series of red struts and cross-bracing wires, giving the structure both rigidity and a classic appearance. The nose features a wooden propeller and an exposed engine area, while the cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing. The tail section is slender, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, also marked with the Iron Cross. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid, all fixed and non-retractable. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood and fabric, typical of early aviation designs.
description: A vintage biplane with gray fabric-covered wings, red struts, and black Iron Cross insignia, featuring an open cockpit and wooden propeller.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stacked biplane wings, open cockpit, and tail with Iron Cross markings.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full wingspan, cross-bracing, and symmetrical Iron Cross insignia on both wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the propeller, engine area, and the length of the fuselage with tail details.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the propeller, landing gear, and the open cockpit behind the upper wing.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, high-mounted wings supported by interplane struts and cross-bracing wires; no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles visible.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit located just behind the upper wing, likely single-seat with no canopy.
